RESPONSE TO PETITION TO VACATE ARBITRATION AWARD AND REQ. THAT ORDER BE CONFORMED FILED BY RESPONDENT SINGH, NARENDRA (TONY)

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. RESPONDENT NARENDRA (TONY) SINGH'S NOTICE OF HEARING ON RESPONSE TO PETITION TO VACATE ARBITRATION AWARD AND REQUEST THAT ORDER BE CONFIRMED IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE ARBITRATION AWARD IS CONFIRMED. THE PETITION TO VACATE WAS SERVED MORE THAN 100 DAYS AFTER THE AWARD WAS SERVED ON RESPONDENT AND IS THEREFORE UNTIMELY. (CCP SEC. 1288.) ADDITIONALLY, PETITIONER NEVER SCHEDULED A HEARING DATE OR SERVED NOTICE OF A HEARING ON RESPONDENT. (CCP SEC. 1290.4.) ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT ; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing On Response To Petition To Vacate Arbitration Award And Req. Thtat Order Be Confirmed
Off Calendar Apr-09-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
RESPONDENT NARENDRA (TONY) SINGH'S Notice Of Hearing On Response To Petition To Vacate Arbitration Award And Request That Order Be Confirmed is Granted. No opposition filed. The Arbitration Award is confirmed. The Petition to Vacate was served more than 100 days after the Award was served on Respondent and is therefore untimely. (CCP sec. 1288.) Additionally, Petitioner never scheduled a hearing date or served notice of a hearing on Respondent. (CCP sec. 1290.4.) ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/ehg
